<!--
Thanks for opening a pull request. Please fill in the sections below.
For details on the contribution workflow, see CONTRIBUTING.md.
-->

## Summary

<!-- One or two sentences describing what this PR does and why. -->

## Type of change

<!-- Pick the closest match. Delete the rest. -->

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] Documentation update (typo, clarification, or new docs)
- [ ] Dataset / content update (new dataset card, blog post, research entry)
- [ ] Refactor or chore (no functional change)
- [ ] Breaking change (would require a major version bump or migration step)

## Linked issue

<!-- Format: "Closes #123" or "Refs #123" -->

## Testing performed

<!-- Describe the verification you ran. Examples:
- npm run build (landing repo)
- python -m pytest tests/test_my_module.py
- Manual check at https://neogenesis.app/<route>
- Schema.org validator pass for the new JSON-LD block
-->

## Schema and citation impact

<!-- Required when changing layout.tsx, llms.txt, sitemap.ts, or any data-* file. -->

- [ ] Schema.org JSON-LD still emits valid output (use Google Rich Results Test or Schema.org validator)
- [ ] llms.txt and llms-full.txt reflect any new SBU, blog post, or research entry
- [ ] sitemap.ts includes any new public route
- [ ] Wikidata / Hugging Face cross-references remain accurate

## Checklist

- [ ] My branch is up-to-date with `master`
- [ ] I have added or updated tests where applicable
- [ ] I have updated `CHANGELOG.md` under the `[Unreleased]` section
- [ ] I have read the project `CONTRIBUTING.md`
- [ ] No secret values are committed (no API keys, no `.env` files)
- [ ] If this PR affects datasets, the corresponding HF dataset card was updated

## Additional notes

<!-- Anything else reviewers should know? Performance impact, follow-up tasks, alternatives considered. -->
